'''mazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zumat|zumat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zumat|zumat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:mazhate|mazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mazhatesher|mazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazhatesherĂ«m|mazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mazhatero|mazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mazhateshĂ«|mazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazhateshĂ«m|mazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimazhatero|gokimazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimazhateshĂ«|gokimazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimazhateshĂ«m|gokimazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomazhankerom|gomazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomazhankeshĂ«|gomazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomazhankeshĂ«m|gomazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomazhankeya|gomazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mazhaterom|mazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazhatemu|mazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mazhateya|mazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimazhaterom|gokimazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimazhatemu|gokimazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimazhateya|gokimazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:mazhazhate|mazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mazhazhatesher|mazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazhazhatesherĂ«m|mazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mazhazhatero|mazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mazhazhateshĂ«|mazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazhazhateshĂ«m|mazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimazhazhatero|gokimazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimazhazhateshĂ«|gokimazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimazhazhateshĂ«m|gokimazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomazhazhankerom|gomazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomazhazhankeshĂ«|gomazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomazhazhankeshĂ«m|gomazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomazhazhankeya|gomazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mazhazhaterom|mazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mazhazhatemu|mazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mazhazhateya|mazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimazhazhaterom|gokimazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimazhazhatemu|gokimazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimazhazhateya|gokimazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠzhĂŠte|mĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠzhĂŠtesher|mĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠzhĂŠtero|mĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokimĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠzhĂŠterom|mĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠzhĂŠtemu|mĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠzhĂŠteya|mĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokimĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokimĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafzhafte|mafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafzhaftesher|mafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafzhaftesherĂ«m|mafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafzhaftero|mafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafzhafteshĂ«|mafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafzhafteshĂ«m|mafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafzhaftero|gokimafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafzhafteshĂ«|gokimafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafzhafteshĂ«m|gokimafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafzhafnkerom|gomafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafzhafnkeshĂ«|gomafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gomafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafzhafnkeya|gomafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafzhafterom|mafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafzhaftemu|mafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafzhafteya|mafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafzhafterom|gokimafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafzhaftemu|gokimafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafzhafteya|gokimafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
